name: @platform/adapters-sentry
description: Sentry adapter: error capture, performance tracing, and error monitoring implementation for the observability interface.

readme.summary: Sentry adapter: error capture, performance tracing, and error monitoring implementation for the observability interface.
responsibilities: Implement the observability error capture interface using the Sentry SDK
Initialize Sentry with DSN, environment, and release metadata from config-runtime
Attach structured context (user, request, trace ID) to error captures
Configure sampling rates for performance monitoring per environment
nonResponsibilities: Does not define the observability interface (owned by observability)
Does not implement distributed tracing spans (owned by adapters-opentelemetry)
Does not own alerting rules or Sentry project configuration
usage: Initialized once at application startup to wire Sentry into the observability layer
Never imported by feature or domain packages
operationalNotes: DSN is resolved from config-runtime — never committed to source control
Sentry source maps must be uploaded as part of the CI build pipeline
